source_pr.title: *: refine code for StmtTxn
source_pr.body:
* If `StmtCommit()` meets error, mark it, rollback the whole transaction later.
* provide `StmtTxn.Valid()` to replace `s.Transaction == nil || !s.Transaction.Valid()`
* merge `txnFuture` into `StmtTxn` and use `changeXXX` to maintain inner state.

@coocood  @winkyao  @jackysp @wentaoxu

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: refine code for StmtTxn.

evidence: files: context/context.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/write.go, new_session_test.go, server/conn.go, session.go, session_fail_test.go, tidb.go, util/mock/context.go
